title: Shri Argala Stotram
intro: Read Shri Argala Stotram with Hindi meaning. Chant this essential hymn to seek the blessings of Maa Durga.
description:
|| Shri Argala Stotram ||

Shri Chandika Dhyanam:
Om Bandhuka-kusumabhasam panchamunda-dhibhasinim.
Sphurachandra-kala-ratnamukutam munda-malinim.||
Trinetram rakta-vasanam pinonnata-ghata-stanim.
Pustakam chakshamalam cha varam chabhayakam kramat.||
Dadhatim sansmaren-nityamuttaram-nayam-anitam.||
Athava
Ya Chandi Madhukaitabhadi-daitya-dalani ya Mahishonmulini
Ya Dhumrekshana-Chandamunda-mathani ya Raktavijashani.
Shaktih Shumbha-Nishumbha-daitya-dalani ya Siddhidatri para
Sa Devi Navakoti-murti-sahita ma patu Vishveshvari.||

Stotram:
Om Namashchandikayai ||
|| Markandeya Uvacha ||
1. Om Jaya tvam Devi Chamunde jaya bhutapaharini.
Jaya sarvagate Devi Kalaratri namostute.||
2. Jayanti Mangala Kali Bhadrakali Kapalini.
Durga Kshama Shiva Dhatri Svaha Svadha namostute.||
3-16. Madhukaitabha-vidhvamsi Vidhatru-varade namah. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Mahishasura-nirnashi bhaktanam sukhade namah. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Dhumranetra-vadhe Devi dharma-kamartha-dayini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Raktavija-vadhe Devi Chanda-munda-vinashini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Nishumbha-Shumbha-nirnashi trilokya-shubhade namah. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Vanditanghri-yuge Devi sarva-saubhagya-dayini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Achintya-rupa-charite sarva-shatru-vinashini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Natebhyah sarvada bhaktya Chaparne duritapahe. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Stuvadbhyo bhakti-purvam tvam Chandike vyadhi-nashini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Chandike satatam yuddhe jayanti papa-nashini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Dehi saubhagyam-arogyam dehi Devi param sukham. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Vidhehi Devi kalyanam vidhehi vipulam shriyam. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Vidhehi dvishatam nasham vidhehi balamuchchakaih. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Surasura-shiroratna-nighrishta-charane Ambike. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
17-24. Vidhyavantam yashasvantam lakshmivantamcha mam kuru. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Devi prachanda-dordanda-daitya-darpa-nishudini. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Prachanda-daitya-darpaghne Chandike pranataya me. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Chaturbhuje chaturvaktra-sansute Parameshvari. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Krishnena sanstute Devi shashvadbhaktya sadambike. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Himachala-suta-natha-sanstute Parameshvari. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Indrani-pati-sadbhava-pujite Parameshvari. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Devi bhaktajanod-dama-dattanando-daye Ambike. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
25-26. Bharyam manoramam dehi manovrittan-usarinim. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||
Tarini durga-samsara-sagarasya-chalodbhave. Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi.||

Phalashruti:
27. Idam stotram pathitva tu mahastotram pathennarah.
Saptashatim samaradhya varamapnoti durlabham.||

|| Iti Shri Markandeya Purane Argala Stotram Sampurnam ||

faq.a1: The Argala Stotram is a significant hymn from the 'Durga Saptashati'. The term "Argala" refers to a bolt or a latch; it acts as a key to unlock the divine grace of Goddess Durga for the devotee.
faq.a2: It is recited to seek the blessings of Goddess Durga for protection, removing life's obstacles, overcoming enemies, and attaining prosperity, health, and spiritual glory.
faq.q3: What is the meaning of the central refrain "Rupam Dehi, Jayam Dehi, Yasho Dehi, Dvisho Jahi"?
faq.a3: It translates to: "Give me beauty (divine form), give me victory, give me fame, and destroy my enemies (the ego and external obstacles)." It is a profound prayer for overall well-being.
faq.q4: When should one recite the Argala Stotram?
faq.a4: It is traditionally recited as part of the preliminary stotras before commencing the main Durga Saptashati (Chandi Path). However, it can also be recited independently for daily spiritual strength.
faq.q5: What is its significance in the Chandi Path?
faq.a5: Along with the Devi Kavacham and the Keelaka Stotram, the Argala Stotram forms the preliminary invocation (Anga Stotra) that prepares the devotee's mind and environment for the main recitation of the Saptashati.
